title: Ingredients
description: One pantry ingredient the household stocks, with how much is currently on hand.

name.description: ingredient name, e.g. 'olive oil'; dedupe key

unit.description: the unit stock/needs are measured in, e.g. 'g' | 'ml' | 'count'

quantity.description: how much is currently in the pantry, in `unit`

lowStockThreshold.description: restock hint: at/below this, the planner treats it as unavailable and the pantry flags it low

updatedAt.description: when the pantry quantity was last changed

usedIn.description: recipes that call for this ingredient
